movie.title: Pechi (2024) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Tamil] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Five young trekkers and their tour guide embark on a weekend adventure in the Kollimalai hills. Despite warnings, they venture into a restricted area, unknowingly entering the domain of a malevolent spirit, which is hell bent on wreaking havoc in their lives. Did they survive the relentless onslaught and harrowing encounter with the supernatural force in the haunted woods?
